selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest next refined-fuel refinement-language reduction on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the refinement contract parent into controller-facing fences for witness-bound non-identity refinement, order-sensitive law-thin operators, finite relative equivalence, non-scalar partial order, and anti-closure or anti-canonical-convergence handling.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Next refined-fuel follow-on after the refinement boundary is now reduced.
Strongest current sims follow-on still sitting in the immediate reduction tranche.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the refinement-language boundary tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: REFINEMENT_CLAIMS_STAY_DOMAIN_SCOPED_WITNESS_BOUND_AND_NON_IDENTITARIAN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's admitted refinement object class without letting it harden into identity or substitution doctrine.

candidate_items.name: REFINEMENT_OPERATORS_AND_COMPOSITES_STAY_ORDER_SENSITIVE_AND_LAW_THIN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Keeps refinement operators local and semantically live instead of silently smoothed into algebraic defaults.

candidate_items.name: INDUCED_EQUIVALENCE_STAYS_FINITE_RELATIVE_AND_CANNOT_COLLAPSE_TO_EQUALITY
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent's limited equivalence admission into a controller-facing anti-equality fence.

candidate_items.name: DERIVED_ORDER_STAYS_PARTIAL_AND_NON_SCALAR
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent's direct guard against refinement comparison becoming scalar grading or total ranking.

candidate_items.name: REFINEMENT_DEPTH_STAYS_FINITE_AND_REFINEMENT_DOES_NOT_SELF_CLOSE_OR_CANONICALLY_CONVERGE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's anti-closure and anti-canonical-outcome posture into a controller-facing fence.

quarantined_items.name: REFINEMENT_LANGUAGE_AS_SAMENESS_OR_SUBSTITUTION_AUTHORITY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent allows refinement structure while explicitly denying identity, equality, and substitution inflation.

quarantined_items.name: REFINEMENT_LANGUAGE_AS_SCALAR_PROGRESS_CLOSURE_OR_CANONICAL_OUTCOME_MACHINE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent is valuable precisely because it blocks grading, closure, and unique convergence overread while leaving a thin refinement layer available.

notes: This batch was produced as the twenty-third controller-facing A2-mid reduction in this audit thread.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
